# Benson Home Solutions - Complete LLMs Context

## Business Overview

Benson Home Solutions is a practical Oregon contractor providing repair, restoration, and maintenance work for residential and commercial properties.

### Legal Entity
- **Company**: Benson Enterprises, LLC
- **Oregon CCB**: #258533
- **Phone**: 541-321-5115
- **Emergency Phone**: 541-413-0480
- **Email**: office@bensonhomesolutions.com
- **Website**: https://bensonhomesolutions.com

### Service Areas

#### Sweet Home 25-Mile Silo
Primary service area within roughly 25 miles of Sweet Home, Oregon:
- Sweet Home
- Lebanon
- Albany
- Brownsville
- Cascadia
- Foster
- Holley
- Crawfordsville
- Scio (where practical)
- Tangent (where practical)

#### Harney County Silo
Remote service area in Eastern Oregon:
- Fields (97710)
- Burns / Lawen area (97720)
- Princeton (97721)
- Diamond (97722)
- Crane (97732)
- Frenchglen (97736)
- Hines (97738)
- Riley (97758)
- Drewsey (97904)

## Core Services

### 1. Inspection Repairs
- Property inspection findings
- Code compliance repairs
- Pre-sale preparation
- Insurance claim documentation

### 2. Water, Mold & Moisture
- Water damage assessment and repair
- Mold investigation and remediation
- Moisture control solutions
- Crawlspace and attic moisture issues

### 3. Window & Door Replacements
- Drafty window replacement
- Damaged door repair
- Weather protection upgrades
- Energy efficiency improvements

### 4. Maintenance Plans
- Residential maintenance subscriptions
- Commercial maintenance contracts
- Church/non-profit facility maintenance
- Preventive maintenance programs

### 5. Emergency Response
- Water intrusion emergencies
- Storm damage response
- Structural emergencies
- Weather-related repairs

### 6. Energy & Weatherization
- Weatherization services
- Energy efficiency upgrades
- Insulation improvements
- Draft reduction

### 7. Property Preservation
- Vacant property maintenance
- Foreclosure property services
- Seasonal property care
- Remote property monitoring

### 8. Residential Remodeling
- Kitchen and bathroom updates
- Interior renovations
- Exterior improvements
- Accessibility modifications

### 9. Commercial Maintenance
- Business facility maintenance
- Retail space upkeep
- Office building services
- Industrial property care

### 10. Church / Non-Profit Facility Maintenance
- Religious facility maintenance
- Non-profit building care
- Community center services
- Specialized facility needs

## Brand Voice

### Tone
- Direct and clear
- Practical and contractor-led
- Documentation-focused
- Calm and competent
- Specific and detailed

### Preferred Phrases
- "Repairs that clear the list."
- "Maintenance that keeps it that way."
- "Send the list, send the photos, text the address."
- "Clear scopes, clean documentation, completed work."
- "Practical repair, restoration, and maintenance work for Oregon properties."

### Avoid
- "Transform your space"
- "Dream home"
- "Premier provider"
- "Top-rated" (unless verified)
- "Unmatched quality"
- "One-stop solution"
- "Trusted partner"
- Fake urgency
- Unsupported guarantees
- Generic remodel fluff

## Brand Colors

```css
benson-maroon:      #722F37
benson-maroon-dark: #5C252C
benson-burgundy:    #8B454D
benson-wine:        #4A1F24
benson-cream:       #F5F1E8
benson-offwhite:    #FAF8F3
benson-charcoal:    #2D2D2D
benson-slate:       #4A4A4A
benson-pale:        #E5E5E5
```

## Technical Stack

### Frontend
- Framework: Next.js 14.2.35
- Language: TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- Deployment: Google Cloud Run

### Backend
- Python-based services
- Google Cloud Platform
- Cloud Run for serverless deployment

### Infrastructure
- Google Cloud DNS
- Google Cloud Load Balancer
- Google Cloud Storage

## Content Guidelines

### SEO Requirements
- Unique titles and meta descriptions
- Clear H1, H2, H3 hierarchy
- Local language where natural
- CCB #258533 where appropriate
- Internal linking
- Descriptive image alt text
- FAQ sections where useful

### Schema Markup
- LocalBusiness
- Contractor
- Service
- FAQPage
- Speakable
- BreadcrumbList

### Performance Targets
- LCP under 2.5s
- FID under 100ms
- CLS under 0.1
- WCAG 2.1 AA compliance

## Image Guidelines

### Image Sources
- Real project photos only
- No fake stock photos
- No AI-generated images as real project photos
- Load optimized images in production

### Image Categories
- Water damage / dry-out
- Mold or moisture investigation
- Crawlspace or attic
- Window replacements
- Door replacements
- Exterior repair
- Property preservation
- Maintenance work
- Equipment
- Before/after repair
- Oregon homes / high-desert / valley conditions

- Assessment procedures
- Temporary protection
- Repair prioritization
- Documentation for claims

- Safety assessment
- Stabilization procedures
- Professional coordination
- Documentation requirements

- Timeline adherence

- Clear project updates
- Change order procedures
- Completion documentation
- Follow-up procedures
